what_was_done: Deep framework comparison: evaluated 11 frameworks against Torus, 3-way memory system comparison (Torus vs AKIRA vs Agent Zero), triaged 10 potential improvements down to 2 approved items. Decisions: (1) Auto tier classification for memories (~20 lines in memory_server.py), (2) Embedding upgrade from all-MiniLM-L6-v2 to gte-multilingual-base with JSON backup (Option 3). Rejected 8 other proposals with documented rationale. Self-corrected FNV1a/dedup confusion and search_knowledge mode claims. 5 decisions saved to memory (1184 total).
